questions.question: Differentiate between supervised and unsupervised learning with one example each.
expectedPoints: Supervised learning uses labeled data (e.g., spam classification)
Unsupervised learning finds patterns in unlabeled data (e.g., customer segmentation)
Contrast based on the presence/absence of output labels

questions.question: Explain the Reinforcement Learning process with the help of its key components. Provide a suitable example.
expectedPoints: Define Agent, Environment, Action, State, Reward
Describe the interaction loop: State -> Agent -> Action -> Environment -> Reward & New State
Explain the goal of maximizing cumulative reward
Provide a concrete example (e.g., game playing AI, robotic navigation)
